acceptance_criteria: README, CHANGELOG and roadmap markers are inspected.
Every finding cites a public path and deterministic evidence.
No repository or private-context mutation occurs.
completion_conditions: A human reviewer confirms the acceptance criteria.
All blockers are resolved or explicitly deferred.
Teachback explains what was inspected and what remains uncertain.
evidence_requirements: Record the exact public files inspected.
Record deterministic command results and exit codes.
Separate findings from suggested next actions.
non_goals: Do not invoke local or remote models.
Do not apply patches or perform Git operations.
Do not read private memory or company context.
objective: Inspect public documentation and produce deterministic evidence without modifying the repository.
stop_triggers: Private, client or company data appears.
The requested scope conflicts with blocked paths.
title: Validate public documentation alignment
